headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -30.8)
key_insights: Fears trending up 43% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 90 quotes and an overwhelming 71 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• While frustration levels dropped from yesterday's peak, the score of 38.8 remains well above typical range and shows sustained public discontent.

• Optimism recovered significantly from yesterday's very low point but still sits in negative territory with limited strong-intensity sentiment.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
